title: The Burned Merchant
description: The merchant who bought the dragon egg finds you days later. His clothes are scorched, his wagon is destroyed, and an enormous shadow circles the mountains behind him.

options.title: Help Hunt the Dragon
options.description: You accept responsibility and follow the creature into the mountains.

options.title: Steal His Map
options.description: While the merchant pleads for help, you take the map showing where the dragon fled.

options.title: Demand More Payment
options.description: You refuse to help unless the merchant pays you again.
